sales.description:
Ancients
Probus (AD 276-282). BI antoninianus (19mm, 3.87 gm, 5h). NGC MS 5/5 - 4/5, Silvering. Cyzicus, 1st officina, AD 280. IMP C M AVR PROBVS P F AVG, radiate, mantled bust of Probus left, seen from front, eagle-tipped scepter in right hand / SO-L-I INVICT-O, Sol in spread quadriga to front, head left, right hand raised in gesture of adlocutio, whip in left; CM / XXIA below. RIC V.II 911. Chardonnay toning.

RIC V.II 606 var. (obverse legend).
